channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Chicago Bears To Indiana Connection?
item.description:
In Hour 3 of the show, Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington ponder about the Chicago Bears situation and wonder if they may move over to play in Indiana as they go down the dysfunction hole. Plus, the guys give their takes on the NBA tanking talks, a cutting corners edition of The Leftovers, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: Declan Doyle Bonding & Kevin Durant Burners
item.description:
In Hour 2 of the show, Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington discuss new Ravens OC Declan Doyle getting his offense going in OTA's later in the year and talk about how Doyle and Lamar Jackson are the same age. Plus, the guys wonder if they have found a new Kevin Durant burner account on social media, the Chiefs restructuring Patrick Mahomes deal, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Maxx Crosby Trade Rumors
item.description:
Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington fill in for The Dan Patrick Show, as they start the show by discussing the Maxx Crosby trade rumors which are making waves after his interview with Caleb Williams. Plus, the guys give an Olympic Hockey update, discuss a USA vs Canada Hockey face off, a in the box edition of ICYMI, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Cramping Issues & Eagle Returns
item.description:
In Hour 3 of the show, Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington talk about the return of Lane Johnson to the Eagles for this upcoming season and ponder if AJ Brown is traded. Plus, the guys talk about Darryn Peterson cramps in College Basketball, find out what is the worst thing we have heard this week, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: NBA Tanking Management & Tua Swaps
item.description:
In Hour 2 of the show, Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington get into the incredibly recent talks on tanking in the NBA to the extent that they have dubbed a new term, "tank management". Plus, the guys ponder if Tua Tagovailoa and Kyler Murray were to swap teams would it really mean anything, talk about the Teddy Bridgewater Act, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Next HC Candidate & What's In the Box?
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for The Dan Patrick Show, as they talk about the Rams promotion of Nate Scheelhaase to offensive coordinator and make a prediction that he is the next future big time HC candidate. Plus, the guys give another spirited Olympic update, make a complaint about Amazon boxes delivered to their houses, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Al Michaels, March Madness Approaches
item.description:
Legendary broadcaster Al Michaels drops by to talk about how Team USA’s gold medal yesterday compares to the original “Miracle on Ice.” And Dan starts to look forward to March Madness and the upcoming NCAA Men’s Basketball Tournament.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – More Gold Medal Love, NBA Tanking Continues
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are still buzzing about Team USA’s gold medal in Men’s Hockey. Plus, Dan weighs in on the NBA MVP odds and what Commissioner Adam Silver is going to do about the continuing issue of tanking in the league.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – USA Wins Gold, Delayed NBA All-Star Reaction
item.description:
Dan dives deep into Team USA’s gold medal in Men’s Hockey at the Olympics after they beat heavily favored Canada in overtime of the gold medal game yesterday. And after returning from a week off, Dan finally gets a chance to react to the NBA All-Star Game and the new format.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – NFL Floating Ideas, Reggie Miller
item.description:
Dan reacts to the NFL considering the addition of a permanent video official who could throw “virtual” flags during live games. And UCLA hoops legend Reggie Miller drops by as the Bruins get ready to face their crosstown rival, USC.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – RIP Boxing, Jay Onrait
item.description:
Dan thinks boxing is a dying sport after the announcement of the Mayweather/Pacquiao rematch and talks about properly marketing professional sports. And Canadian broadcaster Jay Onrait drops by to discuss the Olympic Men’s Hockey gold medal game and the current mood in Canada after coming up short.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Still Celebrating, Mayweather/Pacquiao Is No Joke
item.description:
Dan wonders about the mood in Canada after Team USA took gold in both Men’s and Women’s Hockey at the Olympics, and how last night’s celebration for the men’s team in Miami went. Plus, Dan is surprised, but not really, about the announcement of the Floyd Mayweather Jr. vs. Manny Pacquiao rematch.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – NFL GM’s Speak, Rock and Roll Hall of Fame
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes weigh in on specific issues around the NFL as General Managers had a chance to address the media yesterday. And DP fails to stay in his lane as he shares his thoughts on the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – ABS Improvements, Pat Forde
item.description:
Dan is all in on the MLB Automatic Ball/Strike system and suggests some improvements that will help the fan experience. And Sports Illustrated senior writer Pat Forde drops by to weigh in on Team USA at the Olympics.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Clank!, Pirates Need to Spend Money
item.description:
Dan is getting that nails-on-a-chalkboard feeling lately when he hears the sound of a brick during basketball games and it was too much for him last night. He and the Danettes consider the worst sounds in sports. Plus, Dan takes a detour to MLB Spring Training and weighs in on the Pirates and how they could improve the franchise (hint: they need to SPEND SOME MONEY!).

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Making Your Name, Short Arms
item.description:
Dan can’t wait to see which players you’ve never heard of make names for themselves at the NFL Scouting Combine. Plus, DP and the Danettes discuss who has the shortest and longest arms.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – DeMar DeRozan and the Basketball Hall of Fame, Matt Miller
item.description:
DeMar DeRozan is climbing the NBA all-time career scoring list so Dan and the Danettes consider his career and his chances of making the Hall of Fame. Plus, NFL Draft analyst Matt Miller drops by as the NFL Scouting Combine begins.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – “Arm Length” Is the New “Hand Size,” NFL Combine
item.description:
Dan is talking football as the NFL Scouting Combine gets underway. “Arm length” is the latest talking point for QBs at the Combine, replacing the ever popular “hand size” discussions. And they discuss what looks to be a very busy NFL offseason.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Arm-ageddon, Robert Horry
item.description:
The Danettes measure the length of their arms, holding their own NFL Scouting Combine to crown the arm king. Seven-time NBA champion Robert Horry joins the show, and Dan shares his disappointment that “Big Shot Bob” is not in the Hall of Fame, and Horry expresses his feelings about being left out.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Christian Laettner’s Hall of Fame Dilemma, Daniel Jeremiah
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes consider Christian Laettner’s qualifications for the Naismith Basketball Hall of Fame and/or the National Collegiate Basketball Hall of Fame and the difference between the two. NFL analyst Daniel Jeremiah joins the show and talks about the NFL Scouting Combine and what he’s seen from the on-field drills.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – The NFL Combine Is a Guilty Pleasure, Chet vs. Wemby?
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes are into the guilty pleasure that is watching the NFL Scouting Combine. Dan goes over the NFLPA’s team report cards and notices the correlation between high grades and winning. Plus, DP weighs in on the Chet Holmgren vs. Wemby debate that he didn’t even know existed.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
